description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage and adds a pages job that runs only on the master branch. In the deploy stage, the pages job should execute the exact shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. The job must publish the resulting public directory as an artifact (paths: public) and deploy it to GitLab Pages. Use the default Docker image with no additional services, caches, or variables.
